modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Recipients unable to open email attachments in Outlook.

full_description_text: 
The user reported that when attempting to share SFMC emails by dragging them into email threads as attachments, recipients are unable to open these attachments. Several individuals have mentioned that they are prompted to add an account when trying to access the files. Additionally, the user noted that opening an icalendar file results in the online version of Outlook launching instead of adding the meeting to their calendar. This issue has been occurring over the past week, causing significant disruption in their workflow.
